allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\adamm\\Desktop\\dawnwannahack\\dawnwannahack\\index.html"; $styleEnd = \($lines | Select-String "</style>" | Select-Object -First 1\).LineNumber; $scriptStart = \($lines | Select-String "<script>" | Select-Object -First 1\).LineNumber; $scriptEnd = \($lines | Select-String "</script>" | Select-Object -Last 1\).LineNumber; Write-Output "Total: $\($lines.Count\) lines"; Write-Output "CSS ends ~line: $styleEnd"; Write-Output "JS starts ~line: $scriptStart"; Write-Output "JS ends ~line: $scriptEnd"; Write-Output "CSS lines: $\($styleEnd\)"; Write-Output "HTML lines: $\($scriptStart - $styleEnd\)"; Write-Output "JS lines: $\($scriptEnd - $scriptStart\)")
